description_long: This is a modern office building with a rectangular footprint, featuring two main stories and a flat roof. The facade is dominated by large, horizontally-aligned glass windows framed by white structural elements, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. The ground floor includes expansive glass panels, likely serving as the main entrance and lobby area, while the upper floor continues the window pattern with slightly recessed sections. The building sits on a light gray base, with a dark paved area extending from one side, possibly representing a driveway or parking lot. The structure is primarily composed of concrete, glass, and metal, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation. The overall design emphasizes transparency, openness, and functionality, typical of modern commercial architecture.
description: A sleek, modern office building with large glass windows, white framing, and a flat roof, set on a light gray base with an adjacent dark paved area.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing the main glass facade, white framing, and the entrance area with the adjacent paved surface.
description_view_1: Side view with minimal window detail, mostly showing the solid white wall and the extension of the paved area.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the plain white back wall with no visible windows or entrances, and the paved area extending behind.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the continuation of the glass facade and white framing, with the paved area on the right.
attribute_window_pattern: Regular, horizontally-aligned rectangular windows spanning both floors, with consistent spacing and repetition across the facade.
